features.name: negedge clock edge-triggered always block
features.description: Code should include an always block triggered on the negative edge of a clock signal using always @(negedge clk)

features.name: non-blocking assignment in negedge sequential always block
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment to a register inside an always block sensitive to the negative clock edge

features.name: non-ANSI module port declaration with output reg
features.description: Code should include a non-ANSI style module port list where an output port is separately declared as reg type inside the module body

features.name: D flip-flop with negedge clock sensitivity
features.description: Code should include a D flip-flop implemented with an always block sensitive to the negative edge of a clock, capturing data on the falling edge via non-blocking assignment
